AF001.title: 0.2.15 sign-off drift repaired
AF001.description: W0 successfully updated sign-off-0.2.15.md and carry-forwards-0.2.15.md counts to match actual 0.2.15 close state.

AF002.title: template_leak_detected normalization verified
AF002.description: src/aho/pipeline/dispatcher.py now returns False instead of None for clean results, ensuring stage JSON artifacts emit 'false' instead of 'null'.

AF003.title: Baseline failure count mismatch in W1.json
AF003.description: The W1 acceptance archive claims there are 14 documented baseline failures in artifacts/harness/test-baseline.json. However, inspection of the file on disk shows only 13 entries. The current 12 failures observed in W1 are consistent with a 13-entry baseline (11 persistent + 1 returned-to-failing flake = 12 failed). The number '14' in the archive appears to be a typo.

AF004.title: api_error_count is an alias for internal_error_count
AF004.description: In src/aho/dashboard/otel_aggregator.py, api_error_count is only incremented within the internal_error event block. Both fields in the /api/otel output will always be identical in the current implementation.

AF005.title: api_retries_exhausted_count is a dead field
AF005.description: api_retries_exhausted_count is initialized and rolled up by the aggregator but never incremented at any event ingestion site. It will always return 0.
